languages.text: "Человек, словам которого внимает толпа, и который способен заставить массы пойти за собой, более чем полезен. Польза — хороший критерий праведности".
"A man whose words are heeded by the throng, and who can make the masses follow him, is more than useful. Usefulness is a fine criterion for righteousness."
languages.original_text: "Человек, словам которого внимает толпа, и который способен заставить массы пойти за собой, более чем полезен. Польза — хороший критерий праведности".

traits.locale_text: "A man whose words are heeded by the throng, and who can make the masses follow him, is more than useful. Usefulness is a fine criterion for righteousness."
"A man whose words are heeded by the throng, and who can make the masses follow him, is more than useful. Usefulness is a fine criterion for righteousness."
"A man whose words are heeded by the throng, and who can make the masses follow him, is more than useful. Usefulness is a fine criterion for righteousness."

languages.text: 「人々を導き、人々を従わせる者は、有用である。有用であることは、正義の基準である」
languages.original_text: "A man whose words are heeded by the throng, and who can make the masses follow him, is more than useful. Usefulness is a fine criterion for righteousness."

traits.locale_text: 「人々を導き、人々を従わせる者は、有用である。有用であることは、正義の基準である。」

languages.text: “一个言辞能为大众倾听，能让信众追随的人，是极其有用的。有用与否，便是衡量正义的绝佳标准。”
languages.original_text: "A man whose words are heeded by the throng, and who can make the masses follow him, is more than useful. Usefulness is a fine criterion for righteousness."

traits.locale_text: “一个言辞能为大众倾听，能让信众追随的人，是极其有用的。有用与否，便是衡量正义的绝佳标准。”

languages.text: «Un hombre de cuyas palabras beben las masas, capaz de hacer que le sigan, es más que útil. La utilidad es un buen criterio para la virtud».
languages.original_text: "A man whose words are heeded by the throng, and who can make the masses follow him, is more than useful. Usefulness is a fine criterion for righteousness."

traits.locale_text: «Un hombre de cuyas palabras beben las masas, capaz de hacer que le sigan, es más que útil. La utilidad es un buen criterio para la virtud».

languages.text: "Ein Mann, dessen Worte von der Menge gehört werden, und der die Massen mobilisieren kann, ist mehr als nützlich. Und Nützlichkeit ist ein wichtiges Kriterium für Rechtschaffenheit."
languages.original_text: "A man whose words are heeded by the throng, and who can make the masses follow him, is more than useful. Usefulness is a fine criterion for righteousness."

traits.locale_text: "Ein Mann, dessen Worte von der Menge gehört werden, und der die Massen mobilisieren kann, ist mehr als nützlich. Und Nützlichkeit ist ein wichtiges Kriterium für Rechtschaffenheit."

languages.text: « Un homme qui sait se faire entendre du peuple et le convaincre de le suivre est particulièrement utile. L'utilité est un bon critère de vertu. »
languages.original_text: "A man whose words are heeded by the throng, and who can make the masses follow him, is more than useful. Usefulness is a fine criterion for righteousness."

traits.locale_text: « Un homme qui sait se faire entendre du peuple et le convaincre de le suivre est particulièrement utile. L'utilité est un bon critère de vertu. »

languages.text: "Kalabalığın sözlerine kulak verdiği ve kitleleri peşinden sürükleyebilen bir adam, faydalı olmaktan da ötedir. Fayda, doğruluk kriteridir."
languages.original_text: "A man whose words are heeded by the throng, and who can make the masses follow him, is more than useful. Usefulness is a fine criterion for righteousness."

traits.locale_text: "Kalabalığın sözlerine kulak verdiği ve kitleleri peşinden sürükleyebilen bir adam, faydalı olmaktan da ötedir. Fayda, doğruluk kriteridir."
